qa_rules.rule: Body text below 24pt is invalid on slide decks.
Slides must stay within the word budget for their layout family.
Each slide family must resolve to one dominant reading path, or one deliberate compare pair.
Slides may not resolve to too many equal competing cards.
Reflect slides must stay open, sparse, and below their density budget.
Prompt slides may not exceed three open prompts or forty visible words.
Slides must not solve overflow by shrinking below the text floor instead of splitting.
There must be exactly one visually dominant task or prompt region per page.
Support cue regions must be smaller or lower contrast than main prompt regions.
At least one component family per page must use softer corners or tab treatment.
Student writing regions must have more open white area than adjacent prompt boxes.
Support tools and success check cannot share identical fill, icon, and border treatment.
No page may use more than 3 accent roles.

fails_when: a slide resolves body text below the 24pt floor
a slide exceeds the word budget for its layout family
a slide family is missing a dominant block or deliberate compare pair
a slide uses more than two equal competing cards outside the compare family
a reflect slide exceeds its word budget, line budget, or block budget
a prompt slide exceeds three open prompts
a prompt slide exceeds forty visible words
content was shrunk below the text floor instead of split or rerouted
a page has more than one main_prompt region
support_cue area is equal to or larger than main_prompt area
a page has no major component with soft/round/pill radius treatment
student_response area is smaller than adjacent main_prompt area
support_tools and success_check share identical fill_mode, border_mode, and show_icon
a page uses more than three unique accent roles
